name: Potato and Green Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 pound green beans, cut into 2-inch lengths and steamed 5 minutes
4 large potatoes, cooked until just tender, peeled and cubed (about 4 cups)
2 scallions, sliced, including some green tops
recipeInstructions:
Dressing:
2 tablespoons olive or canola oil
2 tablespoons white wine or rice vinegar
1 large clove garlic, crushed
1 small red onion, thinly sliced into rings
1/2 teaspoon oregano
1/2 teaspoon salt
1/8 teaspoon black pepper, or to taste
Combine all the dressing ingredients in a jar. Cover tightly and shake well.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss gently to mix well.
(Prepare several hours or a day ahead.)
